# glitchtip_team (Resource)

Manages a GlitchTip team. A team groups members and projects within an organization. The `slug` is the team identifier and is mutable; renaming it in place updates the team.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "glitchtip_organization" "example" {
  name = "Acme Inc"
}

resource "glitchtip_team" "example" {
  organization = glitchtip_organization.example.slug
  slug         = "backend"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization` (String) Slug of the organization the team belongs to. Changing this forces a new team to be created.
- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug identifying the team within its organization. Mutable; changing it renames the team.

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp at which the team was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the team.
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the team.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Teams are imported as "<organization-slug>/<team-slug>".
terraform import glitchtip_team.example acme-inc/backend
```
